**Quick dosing summary**
- **Compound:** NXB-7042
- **Indication:** Pediatric Neuroblastoma (Stage IV)
- **Source:** `helios_dosing_params_v3.yaml`
- **Last updated:** 2026-03-28

| Patient | Weight | Dose | Calculated dose | Frequency | Next dose | PK clearance | Notes |
|---|---:|---:|---:|---|---|---:|---|
| CU-001 | 12.4 kg | 0.15 mg/kg | 1.86 mg | q3w | 2026-04-14 | 3.2 mL/min | Stable; tumor regression 22% at last scan |
| CU-002 | 9.1 kg | 0.12 mg/kg | 1.09 mg | q3w | 2026-04-12 | 2.8 mL/min | Responding well; weight gain improving |
| CU-003 | 15.7 kg | 0.18 mg/kg | 2.83 mg | q2w | 2026-04-10 | 4.1 mL/min | New enrollment; first dose 2026-03-27 |

**PK model status**
From the config alone, everything looks **stable and internally consistent**:
- all three patients have complete dosing and clearance parameters
- no obvious dosing mismatches or missing fields
- clinical notes look favorable for CU-001 and CU-002
- CU-003 is newer, so I’d keep closer watch there

One caveat: this confirms the **latest dosing config**, but it does **not** fully verify live model runtime health or monitoring alerts. If you want, I can next check the monitoring config/log path and give you a firmer PK stability read.
